lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the hardcoded local repository path in the gate-fast verification step with a repo-root-discovered or repo-relative command so resumed backend workers do not get sent to a stale workspace path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for baseline-gate-fast-stabilization found `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:74` still instructing workers to run `cd /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control && bash scripts/gate_fast.sh`, which does not match the current workspace and can misdirect resumed sessions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Include absolute mission artifact paths plus the current feature id in compaction-safe bootstrap reminders so resumed workers can reliably recover mission context without reconstructing it from handoffs or progress logs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed baseline-gate-fast-stabilization handoff recorded that, after compaction, mission.md/features.json/validation-contract.md were not directly resolvable from the provided guidance and the worker had to rebuild context manually from other artifacts.
